# Tooltip
<!-- nib-component: v1 | generated: 2026-03-03 | do not edit manually -->

> A small popup that displays information about another element on hover or focus

**Widget type:** `tooltip`
**WAI-ARIA APG:** [tooltip pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/tooltip/)

---

## Anatomy

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `trigger` | The element that shows/hides the tooltip (not part of the tooltip itself) |
| `root` | The tooltip popup container (role=tooltip) |
| `content` | The text content of the tooltip |
| `arrow` | Optional directional arrow pointing to the trigger |

---

## States

| State | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `hidden` | Tooltip is not visible |
| `visible` | Tooltip is displayed — triggered by focus OR hover (never hover-only) |

---

## Variants

- `default` — Standard tooltip
- `rich` — Tooltip with structured content (not plain text)
## Accessibility

**ARIA role:** `tooltip`
**Focus behavior:** not-focusable
**Focus trap:** No
**Required label:** No (content-describes-trigger-via-aria-describedby)
**Touch target minimum:** 44pt iOS / 48dp Android / 24px web

### Keyboard Interaction

| Key | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| `Escape` | Dismisses the tooltip without moving focus |
| `Tab` | Showing on focus is required — tooltip must appear when trigger receives keyboard focus |

### ARIA Attributes

- `aria-describedby`

---

```json
{
  "root": {
    "visible": {
      "background": "color.text.primary",
      "color": "color.text.inverse",
      "border-radius": "border-radius.sm",
      "shadow": "elevation.sm"
    }
  }
}
```
